title: Small Villager Greenhouse
description: Adds a small Villager Greenhouse filled with a variety of plants to the world
body:
### Small Villager Greenhouse

**This mod adds a small Villager Greenhouse filled with a variety of plants and inhabited by villagers.**

![House](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2853754184b8c633b6e437ff0019a46cb566fc1d.jpeg)

You’ll also find some loot and many plants throughout the structure.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26e25c12e0357f6f0a2cf4f6c15f51bf0270efaa.jpeg)

The Villager Greenhouse can spawn in the Plains, Sunflower Plains, Birch Forest, and regular Forest biomes.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpack
